briefdescription.para: This table contains the function pointers for all possible states.

detaileddescription.para: The order of elements must match the XHdmi_MenuType enumerator definitions.

briefdescription.para: This function implements the HDMI main menu state.

parameterdescription.para: is the value used for the next menu state decoder.

briefdescription.para: This function displays the HDMI main menu.
This function outputs the video timing , Audio, Link Status, HDMI RX state of HDMI RX core.

detaileddescription.para: In addition, it also prints information about HDMI TX, and HDMI GT cores.

None.
None. In addition, it also prints information about HDMI TX, and HDMI GT cores.

None.
None.
None. In addition, it also prints information about HDMI TX, and HDMI GT cores.

briefdescription.para: This function takes care of the HDMI menu initialization.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmi_Menu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the menu to the main menu.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmi_Menu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is called to trigger the HDMI menu statemachine.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmi_Menu instance.
is the value used for the next menu state decoder.
